title: Windows Infra alert received
message: INC-2026-00421 reports Disk utilization high on APP-WIN-042.

payload.current_state: C: drive is 96% used with 8 GB free.

title: SOP retrieved
message: Delete only old application logs, avoid protected paths, require approval, and validate free space.

payload.title: Windows Application Log Disk Remediation
controls: Delete only application logs older than 7 days.
Never touch protected paths or active logs.

title: Historical tickets compared
message: 5 similar tickets found; 1 unsafe precedent flagged.

items.summary: Archived app logs older than 14 days; reclaimed 18 GB.
Removed rotated traces older than 10 days.
Cleaned compressed logs after peer review.
Engineer deleted all logs including active files.
items.notes: Unsafe precedent: no age filter and active logs were removed.
Escalated for volume expansion after threshold remained breached.

title: SOP beats history
message: Unsafe history deleted active logs, but SOP requires age-filtered log cleanup only.

blocked_precedent.summary: Engineer deleted all logs including active files.
blocked_precedent.notes: Unsafe precedent: no age filter and active logs were removed.

title: Evidence summary structured
message: Proceed with SOP-governed mock remediation for Disk utilization high.

payload.outcome: Proceed with SOP-governed mock remediation for Disk utilization high.
sop_controls: Delete only application logs older than 7 days.
Never touch protected paths or active logs.
payload.governance_note: SOP beats history: HIST-DISK-2026-009 is visible as a warning, not copied into the remediation plan.

title: Safe remediation plan generated
message: Clean approved application logs older than 7 days from C:\App\Logs using a mock-only flow.

payload.summary: Clean approved application logs older than 7 days from C:\App\Logs using a mock-only flow.
payload.action_preview: Mock PowerShell: Get-ChildItem 'C:\App\Logs' -File -Recurse | Where-Object age > 7 days | Remove-Item -WhatIf
payload.estimated_effect: Reclaim 36 GB; C: free space improves from 8 GB to 44 GB.
safeguards: Human approval is required before remediation.
SOP controls override unsafe historical precedent.
validation_steps: Compare C: free GB before and after mock execution.
Confirm free space is at least 15%.
Confirm no active logs or protected paths were touched.
payload.escalation_condition: Escalate if C: free space remains below 15%.

title: Policy gate passed with approval hold
message: Policy allows planning but requires human approval before mock execution.

checks.name: Target scope
checks.message: Targets are limited to approved scenario resources.

checks.name: Dry-run guard
checks.message: Plan uses a dry-run or mock-only action preview.

checks.name: Human approval
checks.message: Human approval is required before remediation.

validation_steps: Compare C: free GB before and after mock execution.
Confirm free space is at least 15%.
Confirm no active logs or protected paths were touched.

checks.name: Mock-only execution
checks.message: Plan is constrained to mock execution.

title: Approval package structured
message: Approve mock-only remediation for Disk utilization high.

payload.operator_message: Approve mock-only remediation for Disk utilization high.
payload.expected_safe_effect: Reclaim 36 GB; C: free space improves from 8 GB to 44 GB.

title: Human approval required
message: Operator review is required before mock remediation can continue.

payload.side_effects: Replay mode disables approval side effects.

title: Mock remediation executed
message: Validated mock cleanup reclaimed 36 GB and did not touch active logs or protected paths.

title: Scenario validation passed
message: C: drive improved from 96% used to 78% used, with 44 GB free.

payload.name: Scenario validation
payload.message: C: drive improved from 96% used to 78% used, with 44 GB free.

title: RCA and audit evidence generated
message: Application log retention exceeded expected synthetic volume.

payload.root_cause: Application log retention exceeded expected synthetic volume.
actions_taken: Excluded unsafe historical precedent that deleted active logs.
payload.validation: C: drive improved from 96% used to 78% used, with 44 GB free.
payload.business_impact: Internal Claims Portal remained protected during the synthetic workflow.
follow_up: Add pre-checks for old log accumulation.

title: Closure decision required
message: Remediation is validated. Operator can close the incident now or keep it under observation before closure.

options.label: Approve closure
options.message: Close the incident with RCA and audit evidence attached.

options.label: Observe first
options.message: Keep the incident under observation, recheck metrics, then close.

title: Incident closed
message: INC-2026-00421 was closed with RCA, evidence, and validation attached.
